title: farming and way of life
description: this mod-pack features mods like farmers delight and many other "way of life" mods to enhance the calm and aesthetic experience of my worlds. I mainly use this as a way of downloading all my usual mods at once instead of one by one for questcraft.
body:
🌾 Farming & Way of Life — A Calm Minecraft Experience (1.21.1)

Step away from the chaos and embrace the peaceful side of Minecraft with "Farming & Way of Life", a modpack built around calm, creativity, and immersive rural living.

Designed for both singleplayer and multiplayer, this pack invites you to adventure through serene landscapes where farming, building, and exploration go hand in hand. Whether you're crafting beautiful homes with Macaw’s full mod lineup, cultivating crops with Farmer’s Delight, or enhancing your world with immersive details from Supplementaries, every moment is about enjoying the journey at your own pace.

🔸 Key Features:

* 🧑‍🌾 Deep and rewarding farming systems
* 🏡 Expansive building options with Macaw’s architectural mods
* 🌿 Enhanced world details and interactivity with Supplementaries
* 🗺️ Gentle exploration and light adventure elements
* 🧘 Ideal for casual, creative, or cozy playstyles

Perfect for players who enjoy storytelling, aesthetic builds, or simply slowing down and savoring Minecraft in a whole new way.
